task_completion.description: Agent navigates to Crater Lake, Oregon
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view clearly shows Crater Lake (a large, deep blue, circular lake with a small island named Wizard Island) centered in the viewport.

task_completion.description: Agent traces the shoreline using a path tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible line (path) is drawn tracing the edge of the water around the entire circumference of the lake.
The text 'crater_lake_perimeter' is visible in the 'Name' field of the properties dialog or as the label of the item in the sidebar.

task_completion.description: Measurement is visible and within tolerance (25-45 km)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Measurements' tab of the path properties dialog is visible, showing a Length between 25.0 km and 45.0 km (or approx 15.5 - 28 miles).
The item 'crater_lake_perimeter' appears listed under the 'My Places' section in the application sidebar.

task_completion.description: Agent exports the path to the specified KML file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Export' dialog is visible showing the filename 'crater_lake_perimeter.kml' and the destination folder set to 'Documents'.

integrity.description: Agent uses a GUI mapping application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a mapping application interface (e.g., Google Earth Pro) with map controls, sidebars, and menus, not a terminal or script output.

integrity.description: Agent interacts with the map to create the path
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of tool usage, such as the 'Path' or 'Ruler' dialog box being open, or nodes visible on the path line, indicating manual creation rather than loading a pre-made file.

integrity.description: Agent does not manually write KML code
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen typing XML/KML tags into a text editor or IDE to generate the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: Crater Lake, Oregon (distinct circular lake with Wizard Island). Expected shoreline length is ~39.02 km. Valid measurement range: 25.0 km to 45.0 km. The task requires a 'Path' (measuring Length), not a Polygon (measuring Area).
